summary: Mashup Intelligence Room is a MuranoOS room handoff for audio-source management, phrase-level extraction, compatibility discovery, and studio workflow.
final_use_case: It shows the broader MuranoOS pattern: a domain is not just stored, but given instruments, state, search, and workflow controls appropriate to that domain.

instruments.input: source packet, code-ready room description, scope, and intended runtime
instruments.operation: Mashup Intelligence Room is a MuranoOS room handoff for audio-source management, phrase-level extraction, compatibility discovery, and studio workflow.

instruments.instrument_name: Mashup Intelligence Room Room Task Model
instruments.input: user roles, task sequence, room state, and domain objects
instruments.operation: It routes audio sources through an Audio Resonance Room with a SQLite/LanceDB/DuckDB three-database architecture, Resonance Engine, AI Router Console, Automation Console, ingestion, phrase extraction, compatibility search, version memory, workflow state, and export planning so creative or analytic audio work can be managed as a structured room.
